import { useCallback } from "react"; import { useSyncExternalStoreWithSelector } from "use-sync-external-store/shim/with-selector"; function defaultCompare(a, b) { return a === b; } function useStore(atom, selector, compare = defaultCompare) { const subscribe = useCallback( (handleStoreChange) => { if (!atom) { return () => { }; } const { unsubscribe } = atom.subscribe(handleStoreChange); return unsubscribe; }, [atom] ); const boundGetSnapshot = useCallback(() => atom?.get(), [atom]); const selectedSnapshot = useSyncExternalStoreWithSelector( subscribe, boundGetSnapshot, boundGetSnapshot, selector, compare ); return selectedSnapshot; } export { useStore }; //# sourceMappingURL=useStore.js.map
